store_count.label: Store count
store_count.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM RPS.STORE WHERE ACTIVE = 1
store_count.reply: You have **{cnt} active branches** across your network. Would you like to see their sales performance today?

cashier_count.label: Cashier count
cashier_count.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASHIER_FULL_NAME) AS cnt FROM RPS.DOCUMENT WHERE STATUS=4 AND HAS_SALE=1 AND CASHIER_FULL_NAME IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(CASHIER_FULL_NAME) != 'SYSADMIN' AND POST_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE '+08:00', 'MM')
cashier_count.reply: There are **{cnt} cashiers** active so far this month. Want to see their rankings?

item_count.label: Item count
item_count.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT di.DESCRIPTION1) AS cnt FROM RPS.DOCUMENT_ITEM di JOIN RPS.DOCUMENT d ON d.SID = di.DOC_SID WHERE d.STATUS=4 AND di.QTY > 0 AND d.POST_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE '+08:00')
item_count.reply: **{cnt} different items** have been sold today. Want to see which ones are selling the most?

transaction_count.label: Transaction count
transaction_count.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM RPS.DOCUMENT WHERE STATUS=4 AND HAS_SALE=1 AND POST_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE '+08:00') AND POST_DATE < TRUNC(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE '+08:00') + 1
transaction_count.reply: There have been **{cnt} transactions** so far today. Want a full sales summary?

customer_count.label: Customer count
customer_count.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM RPS.CUSTOMER WHERE ACTIVE = 1
customer_count.reply: You have **{cnt} registered customers** in the system. Want to see today's new customer activity?
